sentences.hanzi: 请问，去火车站怎么走？
sentences.pinyin: qǐngwèn, qù huǒchē zhàn zěnme zǒu?
sentences.english: Excuse me, how do I get to the train station?

sentences.hanzi: 我想订一间双人房。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng dìng yī jiān shuāngrénfáng.
sentences.english: I'd like to book a double room.

sentences.hanzi: 飞机几点起飞？
sentences.pinyin: fēijī jǐ diǎn qǐfēi?
sentences.english: What time does the plane take off?

sentences.hanzi: 这个地方值得去看看。
sentences.pinyin: zhège dìfāng zhíde qù kànkan.
sentences.english: This place is worth visiting.

sentences.hanzi: 我的护照在包里。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ de hùzhào zài bāo lǐ.
sentences.english: My passport is in my bag.

sentences.hanzi: 请帮我叫一辆出租车。
sentences.pinyin: qǐng bāng wǒ jiào yī liàng chūzūchē.
sentences.english: Please help me call a taxi.

sentences.hanzi: 我们明天去爬山。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen míngtiān qù pá shān.
sentences.english: We're going hiking tomorrow.

sentences.hanzi: 那个博物馆在哪里？
sentences.pinyin: nàge bówùguǎn zài nǎlǐ?
sentences.english: Where is that museum?

sentences.hanzi: 行李可以放在这里吗？
sentences.pinyin: xíngli kěyǐ fàng zài zhèlǐ ma?
sentences.english: Can I put my luggage here?

sentences.hanzi: 签证还没办好。
sentences.pinyin: qiānzhèng hái méi bàn hǎo.
sentences.english: The visa hasn't been processed yet.

sentences.hanzi: 到北京的高铁票多少钱？
sentences.pinyin: dào běijīng de gāotiě piào duōshao qián?
sentences.english: How much is a high-speed train ticket to Beijing?

sentences.hanzi: 我们在这里住三天。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen zài zhèlǐ zhù sān tiān.
sentences.english: We're staying here for three days.

sentences.hanzi: 酒店的早餐很丰富。
sentences.pinyin: jiǔdiàn de zǎocān hěn fēngfù.
sentences.english: The hotel breakfast is very rich.

sentences.hanzi: 地图上标了几个景点。
sentences.pinyin: dìtú shàng biāo le jǐ gè jǐngdiǎn.
sentences.english: The map marks several scenic spots.

sentences.hanzi: 旅游的时候要注意安全。
sentences.pinyin: lǚyóu de shíhou yào zhùyì ānquán.
sentences.english: Pay attention to safety when traveling.

sentences.hanzi: 我想去那里看看。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù nàlǐ kànkan.
sentences.english: I want to go there and take a look.

sentences.hanzi: 火车站在前面。
sentences.pinyin: huǒchē zhàn zài qiánmiàn.
sentences.english: The train station is ahead.

sentences.hanzi: 导游建议我们先参观古城墙。
sentences.pinyin: dǎoyóu jiànyì wǒmen xiān cānguān gǔ chéngqiáng.
sentences.english: The tour guide suggested we visit the ancient city wall first.

sentences.hanzi: 这家民宿的性价比很高。
sentences.pinyin: zhè jiā mínsù de xìngjiàbǐ hěn gāo.
sentences.english: This guesthouse has very good value for money.

sentences.hanzi: 航班延误了两个小时，乘客都很着急。
sentences.pinyin: hángbān yánwù le liǎng gè xiǎoshí, chéngkè dōu hěn zhāojí.
sentences.english: The flight was delayed by two hours, and the passengers were all anxious.

sentences.hanzi: 我们提前在网上预订了往返机票。
sentences.pinyin: wǒmen tíqián zài wǎng shàng yùdìng le wǎngfǎn jīpiào.
sentences.english: We booked round-trip plane tickets online in advance.

sentences.hanzi: 出国旅行之前最好兑换一些当地货币。
sentences.pinyin: chūguó lǚxíng zhīqián zuìhǎo duìhuàn yīxiē dāngdì huòbì.
sentences.english: Before traveling abroad, it's best to exchange some local currency.

sentences.hanzi: 这条古街两旁都是卖纪念品的小摊。
sentences.pinyin: zhè tiáo gǔ jiē liǎng páng dōu shì mài jìniànpǐn de xiǎo tān.
sentences.english: Both sides of this old street are lined with souvenir stalls.

sentences.hanzi: 自由行比跟团游更灵活，但需要提前做好详细的攻略。
sentences.pinyin: zìyóuxíng bǐ gēntuányóu gèng línghuó, dàn xūyào tíqián zuòhǎo xiángxì de gōnglüè.
sentences.english: Independent travel is more flexible than group tours, but you need to prepare a detailed plan in advance.

sentences.hanzi: 这座古镇保留了明清时期的建筑风格，吸引了大量游客。
sentences.pinyin: zhè zuò gǔzhèn bǎoliú le míng qīng shíqī de jiànzhù fēnggé, xīyǐn le dàliàng yóukè.
sentences.english: This ancient town has preserved its Ming and Qing dynasty architectural style and attracts a large number of tourists.

sentences.hanzi: 旅途中遇到语言障碍时，翻译软件能帮上不少忙。
sentences.pinyin: lǚtú zhōng yùdào yǔyán zhàng'ài shí, fānyì ruǎnjiàn néng bāng shàng bùshǎo máng.
sentences.english: When encountering language barriers during a trip, translation software can be quite helpful.

sentences.hanzi: 高铁的开通大大缩短了城市之间的通行时间。
sentences.pinyin: gāotiě de kāitōng dàdà suōduǎn le chéngshì zhījiān de tōngxíng shíjiān.
sentences.english: The opening of high-speed rail has greatly shortened travel time between cities.

sentences.hanzi: 旅行保险可以在突发状况下减少经济损失。
sentences.pinyin: lǚxíng bǎoxiǎn kěyǐ zài tūfā zhuàngkuàng xià jiǎnshǎo jīngjì sǔnshī.
sentences.english: Travel insurance can reduce financial losses in unexpected situations.

sentences.hanzi: 乡村旅游的兴起带动了偏远地区的经济发展。
sentences.pinyin: xiāngcūn lǚyóu de xīngqǐ dàidòng le piānyuǎn dìqū de jīngjì fāzhǎn.
sentences.english: The rise of rural tourism has driven economic development in remote areas.

sentences.hanzi: 深度旅行要求旅行者放下猎奇心态，融入当地的日常生活节奏。
sentences.pinyin: shēndù lǚxíng yāoqiú lǚxíngzhě fàngxià lièqí xīntài, róngrù dāngdì de rìcháng shēnghuó jiézòu.
sentences.english: Deep travel requires travelers to set aside a novelty-seeking mentality and immerse themselves in the rhythm of local daily life.

sentences.hanzi: 过度商业化正在侵蚀许多世界遗产地的历史真实性。
sentences.pinyin: guòdù shāngyèhuà zhèngzài qīnshí xǔduō shìjiè yíchǎn dì de lìshǐ zhēnshíxìng.
sentences.english: Excessive commercialization is eroding the historical authenticity of many World Heritage sites.

sentences.hanzi: 背包客文化的兴起反映了年轻一代对体验式消费的偏好。
sentences.pinyin: bēibāokè wénhuà de xīngqǐ fǎnyìng le niánqīng yī dài duì tǐyànshì xiāofèi de piānhào.
sentences.english: The rise of backpacker culture reflects the younger generation's preference for experiential consumption.

sentences.hanzi: 邮轮旅游的快速增长对沿海港口城市的接待能力提出了更高要求。
sentences.pinyin: yóulún lǚyóu de kuàisù zēngzhǎng duì yánhǎi gǎngkǒu chéngshì de jiēdài nénglì tíchū le gèng gāo yāoqiú.
sentences.english: The rapid growth of cruise tourism has placed higher demands on the reception capacity of coastal port cities.

sentences.hanzi: 红色旅游线路的开发将革命历史教育与旅游产业有机结合。
sentences.pinyin: hóngsè lǚyóu xiànlù de kāifā jiāng gémìng lìshǐ jiàoyù yǔ lǚyóu chǎnyè yǒujī jiéhé.
sentences.english: The development of red tourism routes organically combines revolutionary history education with the tourism industry.

sentences.hanzi: 景区限流措施虽然影响了短期收入，却有利于游客体验和资源保护。
sentences.pinyin: jǐngqū xiànliú cuòshī suīrán yǐngxiǎng le duǎnqī shōurù, què yǒulì yú yóukè tǐyàn hé zīyuán bǎohù.
sentences.english: Although visitor flow restrictions at scenic areas affect short-term revenue, they benefit tourist experience and resource conservation.

sentences.hanzi: 生态旅游的核心理念在于将环境保护与可持续发展融入旅行的每一个环节。
sentences.pinyin: shēngtài lǚyóu de héxīn lǐniàn zàiyú jiāng huánjìng bǎohù yǔ kě chíxù fāzhǎn róngrù lǚxíng de měi yīgè huánjié.
sentences.english: The core concept of ecotourism lies in integrating environmental protection and sustainable development into every aspect of travel.

sentences.hanzi: 入境免签政策的放宽显著降低了跨境出行的制度性门槛。
sentences.pinyin: rùjìng miǎn qiān zhèngcè de fàngkuān xiǎnzhù jiàngdī le kuàjìng chūxíng de zhìdùxìng ménkǎn.
sentences.english: The relaxation of visa-free entry policies has significantly lowered the institutional barriers to cross-border travel.

sentences.hanzi: 文化遗产旅游的可持续运营需要在游客承载量与遗产保护之间寻求精细化平衡。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà yíchǎn lǚyóu de kě chíxù yùnyíng xūyào zài yóukè chéngzàiliàng yǔ yíchǎn bǎohù zhījiān xúnqiú jīngxìhuà pínghéng.
sentences.english: The sustainable operation of cultural heritage tourism requires seeking a refined balance between tourist carrying capacity and heritage preservation.

sentences.hanzi: 旅游目的地品牌塑造的成败取决于差异化叙事能否引发潜在游客的情感共鸣。
sentences.pinyin: lǚyóu mùdìdì pǐnpái sùzào de chéngbài qǔjué yú chāyìhuà xùshì néngfǒu yǐnfā qiánzài yóukè de qínggǎn gòngmíng.
sentences.english: The success or failure of tourism destination branding depends on whether differentiated narratives can evoke emotional resonance in potential tourists.

sentences.hanzi: 全域旅游理念要求打破传统景区边界，将整个区域作为统一的旅游吸引物来规划。
sentences.pinyin: quányù lǚyóu lǐniàn yāoqiú dǎpò chuántǒng jǐngqū biānjiè, jiāng zhěnggè qūyù zuòwéi tǒngyī de lǚyóu xīyǐnwù lái guīhuà.
sentences.english: The concept of whole-region tourism requires breaking traditional scenic area boundaries and planning the entire region as a unified tourism attraction.

sentences.hanzi: 朝圣旅游中神圣空间的体验维度超越了世俗旅游的消费逻辑。
sentences.pinyin: cháoshèng lǚyóu zhōng shénshèng kōngjiān de tǐyàn wéidù chāoyuè le shìsú lǚyóu de xiāofèi luójí.
sentences.english: The experiential dimension of sacred space in pilgrimage tourism transcends the consumption logic of secular tourism.

sentences.hanzi: 数字游民现象的蔓延模糊了传统意义上旅行与居住、工作与休闲之间的边界。
sentences.pinyin: shùzì yóumín xiànxiàng de mányán móhu le chuántǒng yìyì shàng lǚxíng yǔ jūzhù, gōngzuò yǔ xiūxián zhījiān de biānjiè.
sentences.english: The spread of the digital nomad phenomenon has blurred the traditional boundaries between travel and residence, work and leisure.

sentences.hanzi: 旅游凝视理论揭示了游客与东道社区之间不对等的权力关系。
sentences.pinyin: lǚyóu níngshì lǐlùn jiēshì le yóukè yǔ dōngdào shèqū zhījiān bù duìděng de quánlì guānxì.
sentences.english: The tourist gaze theory reveals the asymmetric power relations between tourists and host communities.

sentences.hanzi: 跨文化旅行体验的深层价值在于迫使个体重新审视自身文化预设的局限性。
sentences.pinyin: kuà wénhuà lǚxíng tǐyàn de shēncéng jiàzhí zàiyú pòshǐ gètǐ chóngxīn shěnshì zìshēn wénhuà yùshè de júxiànxìng.
sentences.english: The deep value of cross-cultural travel experiences lies in forcing individuals to re-examine the limitations of their own cultural presuppositions.

sentences.hanzi: 平台经济对传统旅游中介体系的颠覆重构了价值链中各参与者的议价权力格局。
sentences.pinyin: píngtái jīngjì duì chuántǒng lǚyóu zhōngjiè tǐxì de diānfù chónggòu le jiàzhí liàn zhōng gè cānyùzhě de yìjià quánlì géjú.
sentences.english: The platform economy's disruption of traditional tourism intermediary systems has restructured the bargaining power dynamics of participants in the value chain.

sentences.hanzi: 气候变化对高纬度和高海拔旅游目的地的生态承载力构成了不可逆转的威胁。
sentences.pinyin: qìhòu biànhuà duì gāo wěidù hé gāo hǎibá lǚyóu mùdìdì de shēngtài chéngzàilì gòuchéng le bùkě nìzhuǎn de wēixié.
sentences.english: Climate change poses irreversible threats to the ecological carrying capacity of high-latitude and high-altitude tourism destinations.

sentences.hanzi: 社交媒体时代的'打卡'文化将旅行体验异化为符号消费和身份展演。
sentences.pinyin: shèjiāo méitǐ shídài de 'dǎkǎ' wénhuà jiāng lǚxíng tǐyàn yìhuà wéi fúhào xiāofèi hé shēnfèn zhǎnyǎn.
sentences.english: The 'check-in' culture of the social media era has alienated travel experience into symbolic consumption and identity performance.

sentences.hanzi: 旅游产业的全球化扩张在促进文化交流的同时，亦加剧了目的地社会结构的士绅化与原住民的边缘化。
sentences.pinyin: lǚyóu chǎnyè de quánqiúhuà kuòzhāng zài cùjìn wénhuà jiāoliú de tóngshí, yì jiājù le mùdìdì shèhuì jiégòu de shìshēnhuà yǔ yuánzhùmín de biānyuánhuà.
sentences.english: The global expansion of the tourism industry, while promoting cultural exchange, has also intensified the gentrification of destination social structures and the marginalization of indigenous populations.

sentences.hanzi: 后疫情时代的旅行重构不仅涉及公共卫生风险管控，更触及人们对流动性本身意义的根本性反思。
sentences.pinyin: hòu yìqíng shídài de lǚxíng chónggòu bùjǐn shèjí gōnggòng wèishēng fēngxiǎn guǎnkòng, gèng chùjí rénmen duì liúdòngxìng běnshēn yìyì de gēnběnxìng fǎnsī.
sentences.english: The reconstruction of travel in the post-pandemic era involves not only public health risk management but also touches on a fundamental rethinking of the meaning of mobility itself.

sentences.hanzi: 虚拟现实技术对旅游体验的替代性威胁，迫使业界重新定义'在场'的不可替代价值。
sentences.pinyin: xūnǐ xiànshí jìshù duì lǚyóu tǐyàn de tìdàixìng wēixié, pòshǐ yèjiè chóngxīn dìngyì 'zàichǎng' de bùkě tìdài jiàzhí.
sentences.english: The substitutive threat of virtual reality technology to travel experiences forces the industry to redefine the irreplaceable value of 'being there.'

sentences.hanzi: 慢旅行运动对速度与效率崇拜的反叛，实质上是对现代性时间体制的一种存在论抵抗。
sentences.pinyin: màn lǚxíng yùndòng duì sùdù yǔ xiàolǜ chóngbài de fǎnpàn, shízhì shàng shì duì xiàndàixìng shíjiān tǐzhì de yī zhǒng cúnzàilùn dǐkàng.
sentences.english: The slow travel movement's rebellion against the worship of speed and efficiency is essentially an existential resistance to the temporal regime of modernity.

sentences.hanzi: 旅行书写中的异域想象往往折射出书写者自身文化的焦虑与欲望投射。
sentences.pinyin: lǚxíng shūxiě zhōng de yìyù xiǎngxiàng wǎngwǎng zhéshè chū shūxiězhě zìshēn wénhuà de jiāolǜ yǔ yùwàng tóushè.
sentences.english: The exotic imagination in travel writing often reflects the anxiety and desire projection of the writer's own culture.

sentences.hanzi: 全球流动性的不平等分配揭示了旅行自由作为一种隐性特权的结构性本质。
sentences.pinyin: quánqiú liúdòngxìng de bù píngděng fēnpèi jiēshì le lǚxíng zìyóu zuòwéi yī zhǒng yǐnxìng tèquán de jiégòuxìng běnzhì.
sentences.english: The unequal distribution of global mobility reveals the structural nature of travel freedom as a form of implicit privilege.
